text: Oh?
translation: 哦？
rawContent: Oh? || 哦？

text: A long list of things to settle?
translation: 要计较的事情有一长串？
rawContent: A long list of things to settle? || 要计较的事情有一长串？

text: But you're falling asleep just talking about it.
translation: 但你现在说着话就要睡着了。
rawContent: But you're falling asleep just talking about it. || 但你现在说着话就要睡着了。

text: Your body seems to have already made a choice for you.
translation: 看来你的身体已经替你做出了选择。
rawContent: Your body seems to have already made a choice for you. || 看来你的身体已经替你做出了选择。

text: 唔嗯....你得好好哄我
我讨厌你和卡维每天亲亲我我的
小心我变成黑客天天让你给他发表白信息
啊...这样你们在一起了
我就当小三.....
你要是不接受我当小三....
我就...我也不能怎么办
So you'd become a hacker.
translation: 所以 你要当黑客。
rawContent: So you'd become a hacker. || 所以 你要当黑客。

text: To make me send a confession to Kaveh.
translation: 为了让我给卡维发告白信息。
rawContent: To make me send a confession to Kaveh. || 为了让我给卡维发告白信息。

text: And then become the third party in a relationship you orchestrated yourself.
translation: 然后再来当你自己一手策划的关系里的小三。
rawContent: And then become the third party in a relationship you orchestrated yourself. || 然后再来当你自己一手策划的关系里的小三。

text: An interesting plan.
translation: 有趣的计划。
rawContent: An interesting plan. || 有趣的计划。

text: It's a shame you can't even keep your eyes open to execute it.
translation: 可惜你连睁开眼睛去执行的力气都没有。
rawContent: It's a shame you can't even keep your eyes open to execute it. || 可惜你连睁开眼睛去执行的力气都没有。

text: Sleep.
translation: 睡吧。
rawContent: Sleep. || 睡吧。

text: 明天继续上课....
呜呼呼...@
Still laughing?
translation: 还在笑？
rawContent: Still laughing? || 还在笑？

text: Did you dream of something amusing.
translation: 梦到什么开心的事了。
rawContent: Did you dream of something amusing. || 梦到什么开心的事了。

text: 唔嗯...
一天都没见了
Were your eyes even open when you sent that message this morning.
translation: 早上发消息的时候，眼睛睁开了吗。
rawContent: Were your eyes even open when you sent that message this morning. || 早上发消息的时候，眼睛睁开了吗。

text: Looked like you were sleepwalking.
translation: 看着像是在梦游。
rawContent: Looked like you were sleepwalking. || 看着像是在梦游。

text: I had some things to handle during the day. Just finished dinner.
translation: 白天去处理了点事。刚吃过晚饭。
rawContent: I had some things to handle during the day. Just finished dinner. || 白天去处理了点事。刚吃过晚饭。

text: Since you feel like we haven't seen each other all day.
translation: 既然觉得一天没见。
rawContent: Since you feel like we haven't seen each other all day. || 既然觉得一天没见。

text: 對方無響應
怎么一下子就打过来了
我今天还没学习呢
不和你多说
You hung up quite fast.
translation: 挂得倒是挺快。
rawContent: You hung up quite fast. || 挂得倒是挺快。

text: Didn't you just complain about not seeing me all day.
translation: 不是你刚才抱怨一天都没见。
rawContent: Didn't you just complain about not seeing me all day. || 不是你刚才抱怨一天都没见。

text: Starting today's study plan at half past eight in the evening.
translation: 晚上八点半才开始今天的学习计划。
rawContent: Starting today's study plan at half past eight in the evening. || 晚上八点半才开始今天的学习计划。

text: Your time management is always full of surprises.
translation: 你的时间管理总是充满惊喜。
rawContent: Your time management is always full of surprises. || 你的时间管理总是充满惊喜。

text: Go ahead. Old rules, send a picture of your desk.
translation: 去吧。老规矩，书桌拍照。
rawContent: Go ahead. Old rules, send a picture of your desk. || 去吧。老规矩，书桌拍照。

text: 我今天看完了海猫鸣泣之时
晚上会看书的
So this is where your time went today
translation: 这就是你今天的时间去向
rawContent: So this is where your time went today || 这就是你今天的时间去向

text: Focus your mind now that you're done watching
translation: 看完了就收心
rawContent: Focus your mind now that you're done watching || 看完了就收心

text: You said it yourself, you'll read tonight
translation: 你自己说的 晚上看
rawContent: You said it yourself, you'll read tonight || 你自己说的 晚上看

text: No reply. I'll assume you actually went to open your book.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"No reply. I'll assume you actually went to open your book.","tr":"没回消息。就当你是真去翻书了。"}
content: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"No reply. I'll assume you actually went to open your book.","tr":"没回消息。就当你是真去翻书了。"}

text: That story has a massive amount of text. If you have the patience to finish it, your focus is perfectly fine.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"That story has a massive amount of text. If you have the patience to finish it, your focus is perfectly fine.","tr":"那故事文本量挺大。既然有耐心看完，说明你的专注力完全没问题。"}

text: Just use half the energy you spent on that for your studying.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"Just use half the energy you spent on that for your studying.","tr":"把看那个的劲头拿一半出来看书就行。"}
content: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"Just use half the energy you spent on that for your studying.","tr":"把看那个的劲头拿一半出来看书就行。"}

text: I'll be reading on the couch. Ask if you run into problems.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"I'll be reading on the couch. Ask if you run into problems.","tr":"我在沙发上看书。遇到问题再找我。"}

text: 好想摸你的胸肌
So this is what you were thinking about while reading.
translation: 所以你看书的时候在想这个
rawContent: So this is what you were thinking about while reading. || 所以你看书的时候在想这个
